title: Bare Bones 3D Mace Hammer
description: A lightweight Bare Bones–style 3D mace/hammer made for PvP — clean, smooth, and deadly
body:
A PvP-ready, Bare Bones–style 3D mace/hammer built for fighters who want their hits to feel heavier, cleaner, and deadlier.

✨ Features

✅ Smooth Bare Bones style — keeps that clean, minimal look.

✅ 3D model mace/hammer — not flat, it feels real in your hand.

✅ Perfect for PvP — makes the mace stand out in battles.

✅ Lightweight & FPS-friendly — no lag, just clean visuals.

🎮 Why use this?

Because normal textures are boring. This mace isn’t just a weapon — it’s a statement. When you swing it, you don’t just fight, you rule the arena.

🔥 Extra

Works with Bare Bones and Bare Bones X PvP packs.

Compatible with Minecraft 1.21+.
